title: cassia glaberrima
intro: Cassia glaberrima, also known as sweet cassia, is a flowering plant species within the legume family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cassia glaberrima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Cassia glaberrima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization of its therapeutic benefits.
